nasb.text: Is it not yet just a little while Before Lebanon will be turned into a fertile field, And the fertile field will be considered as a forest?

esv.text: Is it not yet a very little while until Lebanon shall be turned into a fruitful field, and the fruitful field shall be regarded as a forest?

cnv.text: 不是還有一點點的時候， 黎巴嫩就要變為肥田， 肥田就要被看為樹林嗎？

ccb.text: 再过不久，黎巴嫩将变成沃野， 沃野上庄稼茂密如林。

csbs.text: 难道不是还有短短的一会儿， 黎巴嫩就要变为果园， 而果园要被看为果林吗？
